desc: Six cats cross the forest to the ocean to meet Midnight the badger, who warns them the Twolegs will destroy their home.
descZh: 六只猫穿越森林来到海边，会见獾午夜，得知两脚兽将摧毁它们的家园。

q.en: What kind of animal is Midnight, the wise creature the traveling cats meet at the ocean?
q.zh: 远行的猫在海边见到的那只聪明的动物「午夜」是什么？

explain.en: Midnight is a clever old badger who lives alone at the sun-drown-place (the ocean).
explain.zh: 午夜是一只聪明的老獾，独自生活在太阳沉没之地（大海边）。

q.en: Why do the four Clans have to leave their forest home?
q.zh: 四大猫族为什么要离开它们的森林家园？

options.en: A great flood covers the trees
options.zh: 一场大洪水淹没了树林

options.en: Twolegs are cutting down the forest

explain.en: Midnight warns that the Twolegs (humans) will destroy the forest, so the Clans must find a new home.
explain.zh: 午夜警告说两脚兽（人类）将摧毁森林，所以猫族必须寻找新的家园。

q.en: What does Midnight say the Clans' new home will be near?
q.zh: 午夜说猫族的新家园会在什么旁边？

explain.en: She tells them to follow the sun to the water, then turn and keep the water on their right until they reach a lake.
explain.zh: 她告诉他们追着太阳走到水边，再转弯并让水一直在右边，直到抵达一片湖泊。

q.en: Where does Midnight, the wise badger, make her home?
q.zh: 聪明的獾午夜把家安在哪里？

options.zh: 在太阳沉没之地（大海边）

explain.en: The cats travel all the way to the sun-drown-place, the edge of the ocean, to find her.
explain.zh: 猫们一路走到太阳沉没之地——大海的边缘——才找到她。

q.en: Which ThunderClan warrior is chosen to lead the quest to find a new home?
q.zh: 雷族哪只武士被选中带领寻找新家园的旅程？

explain.en: Brambleclaw is picked by the medicine cats' signs to lead the journey to the sun-drown-place.
explain.zh: 根据巫医们得到的征兆，荆棘爪被选中带领大家前往太阳沉没之地。

q.en: Which cat is NOT chosen but secretly follows the travelers on the journey?
q.zh: 哪只猫没有被选中，却偷偷跟上了远行的队伍？

explain.en: Squirrelpaw hides and stows away, joining the quest even though she was not one of the chosen cats.
explain.zh: 松鼠爪偷偷藏起来跟上队伍，尽管她并不是被选中的猫之一。

q.en: Which WindClan apprentice is one of the cats who travels to the sun-drown-place?
q.zh: 哪只风族学徒是前往太阳沉没之地的猫之一？

explain.en: Crowpaw represents WindClan on the long journey across the forest to the ocean.
explain.zh: 乌掌代表风族，踏上了穿越森林前往大海的漫长旅程。

q.en: Which ShadowClan cat, the daughter of Tigerstar, joins the journey?
q.zh: 哪位虎星的女儿、影族猫加入了旅程？

explain.en: Tawnypelt, sister of Brambleclaw and daughter of Tigerstar, travels for ShadowClan.
explain.zh: 豹斑是荆棘爪的妹妹、虎星的女儿，代表影族参加了旅程。

q.en: Which two RiverClan siblings travel together on the quest?
q.zh: 哪两只河族兄弟姐妹一同踏上了旅程？

explain.en: RiverClan sends two cats: Feathertail and her brother Stormfur, who are littermates.
explain.zh: 河族派出了两只猫：羽尾和她的兄弟暴毛，它们是一窝出生的手足。

q.en: At the start of the story, what warns the medicine cats that danger is coming to the forest?
q.zh: 故事开始时，是什么警告巫医们森林即将面临危险？

options.en: A shared dream of a dark cloud and rising water
options.zh: 一场关于乌云和上涨洪水的共同梦境

options.en: A message carried by a bird
A scroll left by a Twoleg
options.zh: 两脚兽留下的一卷字纸

explain.en: The medicine cats of all four Clans share a troubling dream of water swallowing the forest, sparking the quest.
explain.zh: 四大猫族的巫医都做了同一个不安的梦，梦见洪水吞没森林，由此开启了这场旅程。
